# CVXR

CVXR provides an object-oriented modeling language for convex
optimization, similar to [CVXPY](https://www.cvxpy.org/),
[CVX](http://cvxr.com/cvx/), [YALMIP](https://yalmip.github.io/), and
[Convex.jl](https://jump.dev/Convex.jl/stable/). It allows you to
formulate convex optimization problems in natural mathematical syntax
rather than the restrictive standard form required by most solvers. You
specify an objective and a set of constraints by combining constants,
variables, and parameters using a library of functions with known
mathematical properties. CVXR then applies signed [disciplined convex
programming
(DCP)](https://web.stanford.edu/~boyd/papers/pdf/disc_cvx_prog.pdf) to
verify the problem’s convexity. Once verified, the problem is converted
into standard conic form and passed to an appropriate backend solver.

This version is a ground-up rewrite built on the
[S7](https://rconsortium.github.io/S7/) object system, designed to
mirror CVXPY 1.8 closely. It is **~4–5x faster** than the previous
S4-based release, ships with 13 solvers (4 built-in), and supports DCP,
DGP, DQCP, complex variables, mixed-integer programming, and
warm-starting.

For tutorials, worked examples, and the full story, visit the [CVXR
website](https://cvxr.rbind.io).

## Installation

Install the released version from CRAN:

``` r

install.packages("CVXR")
```

Or install the development version from GitHub:

``` r

# install.packages("pak")
pak::pak("cvxgrp/CVXR")
```

## Quick example

``` r

library(CVXR)

# Data
set.seed(42)
n <- 50; p <- 10
X <- matrix(rnorm(n * p), n, p)
beta_true <- c(rep(1, 5), rep(0, 5))
y <- X %*% beta_true + rnorm(n, sd = 0.5)

# Problem
beta <- Variable(p)
objective <- Minimize(sum_squares(y - X %*% beta) + 0.1 * p_norm(beta, 1))
prob <- Problem(objective)

# Solve (Clarabel is the default solver)
result <- psolve(prob)
result                          # optimal value
estimated <- value(beta)        # coefficient estimates
```

## Documentation

- **Tutorials and examples**: <https://cvxr.rbind.io>
- **Package reference**: <https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/>
- **Paper**: Fu, Narasimhan, and Boyd (2020). “CVXR: An R Package for
  Disciplined Convex Optimization.” *Journal of Statistical Software*,
  94(14), 1–34.
  [doi:10.18637/jss.v094.i14](https://doi.org/10.18637/jss.v094.i14)

If you use CVXR in your work, please cite the paper above
(`citation("CVXR")`).

## License

Apache License 2.0

# Package index

## Core classes

Variables, parameters, constants, problems, and constraints

- [`Variable()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/Variable.md) :
  Create an Optimization Variable
- [`Parameter()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/Parameter.md) :
  Create a Parameter
- [`Constant()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/Constant.md) :
  Create a Constant Expression
- [`Problem()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/Problem.md) :
  Create an Optimization Problem
- [`Minimize()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/Minimize.md) :
  Create a Minimization Objective
- [`Maximize()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/Maximize.md) :
  Create a Maximization Objective
- [`Equality()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/Equality.md) :
  Create an Equality Constraint
- [`Inequality()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/Inequality.md)
  : Create an Inequality Constraint
- [`NonNeg()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/NonNeg.md) : Create
  a Non-Negative Constraint
- [`NonPos()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/NonPos.md) : Create
  a Non-Positive Constraint
- [`Zero()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/Zero.md) : Create a
  Zero Constraint
- [`PSD()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/PSD.md) : Create a
  Positive Semidefinite Constraint
- [`ExpCone()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/ExpCone.md) :
  Create an Exponential Cone Constraint
- [`SOC()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/SOC.md) : Create a
  Second-Order Cone Constraint
- [`PowCone3D()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/PowCone3D.md) :
  Create a 3D Power Cone Constraint
- [`PowConeND()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/PowConeND.md) :
  Create an N-Dimensional Power Cone Constraint
- [`FiniteSet()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/FiniteSet.md) :
  FiniteSet Constraint

## Solve interface

Solving problems and extracting results

- [`psolve()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/psolve.md) : Solve
  a Convex Optimization Problem
- [`value()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/value.md) : Get the
  Numeric Value of an Expression
- [`` `value<-`() ``](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/value-set.md)
  : Set the Value of a Leaf Expression
- [`dual_value()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/dual_value.md)
  : Get the Dual Value of a Constraint
- [`status()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/status.md) : Get
  the Solution Status of a Problem
- [`solution()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/solution.md) :
  Get the Raw Solution Object
- [`problem_data()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/problem_data.md)
  : Get Problem Data for a Solver
- [`solve_via_data()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/solve_via_data.md)
  : Solve via Raw Data
- [`problem_unpack_results()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/problem_unpack_results.md)
  : Unpack Solver Results into a Problem
- [`unpack_results()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/unpack_results.md)
  **\[deprecated\]** : Unpack Results (backward-compatible alias)
- [`solver_stats()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/solver_stats.md)
  : Get Solver Statistics
- [`solver_default_param()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/solver_default_param.md)
  : Standard Solver Parameter Mappings
- [`installed_solvers()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/installed_solvers.md)
  : List installed solvers
- [`available_solvers()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/available_solvers.md)
  [`exclude_solvers()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/available_solvers.md)
  [`include_solvers()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/available_solvers.md)
  [`set_excluded_solvers()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/available_solvers.md)
  : List available solvers
- [`residual()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/residual.md) :
  Get the Residual of a Constraint
- [`violation()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/violation.md) :
  Get the Violation of a Constraint

## Solvers

Solver name constants

- [`SCS_SOLVER`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/solver-constants.md)
  [`OSQP_SOLVER`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/solver-constants.md)
  [`CLARABEL_SOLVER`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/solver-constants.md)
  [`HIGHS_SOLVER`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/solver-constants.md)
  [`MOSEK_SOLVER`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/solver-constants.md)
  [`GUROBI_SOLVER`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/solver-constants.md)
  [`GLPK_SOLVER`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/solver-constants.md)
  [`GLPK_MI_SOLVER`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/solver-constants.md)
  [`ECOS_SOLVER`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/solver-constants.md)
  [`ECOS_BB_SOLVER`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/solver-constants.md)
  [`CPLEX_SOLVER`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/solver-constants.md)
  [`CVXOPT_SOLVER`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/solver-constants.md)
  [`PIQP_SOLVER`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/solver-constants.md)
  : Solver Name Constants

## Status constants

Solution status values

- [`OPTIMAL`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/status-constants.md)
  [`INFEASIBLE`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/status-constants.md)
  [`UNBOUNDED`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/status-constants.md)
  [`SOLVER_ERROR`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/status-constants.md)
  [`OPTIMAL_INACCURATE`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/status-constants.md)
  [`INFEASIBLE_INACCURATE`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/status-constants.md)
  [`UNBOUNDED_INACCURATE`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/status-constants.md)
  [`USER_LIMIT`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/status-constants.md)
  [`INFEASIBLE_OR_UNBOUNDED`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/status-constants.md)
  : Solution Status Constants

## Math and standard function dispatch

Standard R functions that work directly on CVXR expressions. abs, exp,
log, sqrt, sum, max, min (group generics); norm, mean, diff (S4
generics); sd, var, outer (masking wrappers).

- [`norm()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/math_atoms.md)
  [`sd()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/math_atoms.md)
  [`var()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/math_atoms.md)
  [`outer()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/math_atoms.md) :
  Standard R Functions for CVXR Expressions

## Elementwise atoms

Functions applied element-by-element

- [`entr()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/entr.md) : Create an
  entropy atom -x \* log(x)
- [`huber()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/huber.md) : Create a
  Huber loss atom
- [`inv_pos()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/inv_pos.md) :
  Inverse position: \\x^{-1}\\ (for x \> 0)
- [`kl_div()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/kl_div.md) : KL
  Divergence: x\*log(x/y) - x + y
- [`log1p_atom()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/log1p_atom.md)
  [`log1p_expr()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/log1p_atom.md)
  : Log(1 + x) — elementwise
- [`logistic()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/logistic.md) :
  Logistic function: log(1 + exp(x)) — elementwise
- [`loggamma()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/loggamma.md) :
  Elementwise log of the gamma function
- [`log_normcdf()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/log_normcdf.md)
  : Elementwise log of the standard normal CDF
- [`neg()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/neg.md) : Negative
  part: -min(x, 0)
- [`pos()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/pos.md) : Positive
  part: max(x, 0)
- [`power()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/power.md) : Create a
  Power atom
- [`scalene()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/scalene.md) :
  Scalene penalty: alpha \* pos(x) + beta \* neg(x)
- [`square()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/square.md) : Square
  of an expression: x^2
- [`xexp()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/xexp.md) : x \*
  exp(x) — elementwise

## Aggregation atoms

Functions that reduce or summarize entries

- [`sum_entries()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/sum_entries.md)
  : Sum the entries of an expression
- [`max_entries()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/max_entries.md)
  : Maximum entry of an expression
- [`min_entries()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/min_entries.md)
  : Minimum entry of an expression
- [`max_elemwise()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/max_elemwise.md)
  : Elementwise maximum of expressions
- [`min_elemwise()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/min_elemwise.md)
  : Elementwise minimum of expressions
- [`cumsum_axis()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/cumsum_axis.md)
  : Cumulative sum along an axis
- [`cummax_expr()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/cummax_expr.md)
  : Cumulative maximum along an axis
- [`prod_entries()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/prod_entries.md)
  : Product of entries along an axis
- [`log_sum_exp()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/log_sum_exp.md)
  : Log-sum-exp: log(sum(exp(x)))
- [`sum_squares()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/sum_squares.md)
  : Sum of squares (= quad_over_lin(x, 1))
- [`sum_largest()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/sum_largest.md)
  : Sum of k largest entries
- [`sum_smallest()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/sum_smallest.md)
  : Sum of k smallest entries
- [`geo_mean()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/geo_mean.md) :
  (Weighted) geometric mean of a vector
- [`harmonic_mean()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/harmonic_mean.md)
  : Harmonic mean: n / sum(1/x_i)
- [`ptp()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/ptp.md) : Peak-to-peak
  (range): max(x) - min(x)
- [`cvxr_mean()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/cvxr_mean.md) :
  Mean of an expression
- [`cvxr_std()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/cvxr_std.md)
  [`std()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/cvxr_std.md) :
  Standard deviation of an expression
- [`cvxr_var()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/cvxr_var.md) :
  Variance of an expression
- [`cvar()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/cvar.md) :
  Conditional Value at Risk (CVaR)

## Norm and distance atoms

Norm functions and related atoms

- [`cvxr_norm()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/cvxr_norm.md) :
  Compute a norm of an expression
- [`p_norm()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/p_norm.md) :
  General p-norm of an expression
- [`norm1()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/norm1.md) : L1 norm
  of an expression
- [`norm2()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/norm2.md)
  **\[deprecated\]** : Euclidean norm (deprecated alias)
- [`norm_inf()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/norm_inf.md) :
  L-infinity norm of an expression
- [`norm_nuc()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/norm_nuc.md) :
  Nuclear norm (sum of singular values)
- [`mixed_norm()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/mixed_norm.md)
  : Mixed norm (\\L\_{p,q}\\ norm): column-wise p-norm, then q-norm
- [`quad_form()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/quad_form.md) :
  Quadratic form x^T P x
- [`quad_over_lin()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/quad_over_lin.md)
  : Sum of squares divided by a scalar
- [`matrix_frac()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/matrix_frac.md)
  : Matrix fractional function

## Linear algebra atoms

Matrix operations and structural atoms

- [`bmat()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/bmat.md) : Construct
  a Block Matrix
- [`conv()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/conv.md) : 1D
  discrete convolution
- [`DiagMat()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/DiagMat.md) :
  Extract Diagonal from a Matrix
- [`DiagVec()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/DiagVec.md) :
  Vector to Diagonal Matrix
- [`hstack()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/hstack.md) :
  Horizontal concatenation of expressions
- [`vstack()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/vstack.md) :
  Vertical concatenation of expressions
- [`kron()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/kron.md) : Kronecker
  product of two expressions
- [`lambda_max()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/lambda_max.md)
  : Maximum eigenvalue
- [`lambda_min()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/lambda_min.md)
  : Minimum eigenvalue
- [`lambda_sum_largest()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/lambda_sum_largest.md)
  : Sum of largest k eigenvalues
- [`lambda_sum_smallest()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/lambda_sum_smallest.md)
  : Sum of smallest k eigenvalues
- [`log_det()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/log_det.md) :
  Log-determinant
- [`matrix_trace()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/matrix_trace.md)
  : Trace of a square matrix expression
- [`partial_trace()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/partial_trace.md)
  : Partial trace of a tensor product expression
- [`partial_transpose()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/partial_transpose.md)
  : Partial transpose of a tensor product expression
- [`reshape_expr()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/reshape_expr.md)
  : Reshape an expression to a new shape
- [`sigma_max()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/sigma_max.md) :
  Maximum singular value
- [`upper_tri()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/upper_tri.md) :
  Extract strict upper triangle of a square matrix
- [`vec()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/vec.md) : Vectorize an
  expression (column vector)
- [`vec_to_upper_tri()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/vec_to_upper_tri.md)
  : Reshape a vector into an upper triangular matrix

## Arithmetic and product atoms

Multiplication, dot products, and related

- [`multiply()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/multiply.md)
  **\[deprecated\]** : Elementwise multiplication (deprecated)
- [`vdot()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/vdot.md) : Vector dot
  product (inner product)
- [`scalar_product()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/scalar_product.md)
  : Scalar product (alias for vdot)
- [`cvxr_outer()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/cvxr_outer.md)
  : Outer product of two vectors
- [`dotsort()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/dotsort.md) :
  Weighted sorted dot product
- [`inv_prod()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/inv_prod.md) :
  Reciprocal of product of entries
- [`tr_inv()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/tr_inv.md) : Trace
  of matrix inverse
- [`total_variation()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/total_variation.md)
  : Total variation of a vector or matrix
- [`tv()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/tv.md)
  **\[deprecated\]** : Total variation (deprecated alias)
- [`cvxr_diff()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/cvxr_diff.md) :
  Compute kth Order Differences of an Expression

## Special atoms

Perspective, DGP, DQCP, and other specialized atoms

- [`perspective()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/perspective.md)
  : Perspective Transform
- [`diff_pos()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/diff_pos.md) :
  The difference x - y with domain x \> y \> 0
- [`resolvent()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/resolvent.md) :
  Resolvent inverse(sI - X)
- [`one_minus_pos()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/one_minus_pos.md)
  : The difference 1 - x with domain (0, 1)
- [`eye_minus_inv()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/eye_minus_inv.md)
  : Unity resolvent (I - X) inverse for positive square matrix X
- [`pf_eigenvalue()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/pf_eigenvalue.md)
  : Perron-Frobenius eigenvalue of a positive matrix
- [`gmatmul()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/gmatmul.md) :
  Geometric matrix multiplication A diamond X
- [`ceil_expr()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/ceil_expr.md) :
  Elementwise Ceiling
- [`floor_expr()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/floor_expr.md)
  : Elementwise Floor
- [`condition_number()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/condition_number.md)
  : Condition number of a PSD matrix
- [`gen_lambda_max()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/gen_lambda_max.md)
  : Maximum generalized eigenvalue
- [`dist_ratio()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/dist_ratio.md)
  : Distance ratio
- [`indicator()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/indicator.md) :
  Indicator function for constraints

## Logic atoms

Boolean logic operations for mixed-integer problems

- [`And()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/And.md) : Logical AND
- [`Or()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/Or.md) : Logical OR
- [`Not()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/Not.md) : Logical NOT
- [`Xor()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/Xor.md) : Logical XOR
- [`implies()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/implies.md) :
  Logical Implication
- [`iff()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/iff.md) : Logical
  Biconditional

## Constraint operators

Operators for creating constraints

- [`` `%>>%` ``](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/grapes-greater-than-greater-than-grapes.md)
  : Positive Semidefinite Constraint Operator
- [`` `%<<%` ``](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/grapes-less-than-less-than-grapes.md)
  : Negative Semidefinite Constraint Operator

## Expression properties

Query properties of CVXR expressions

- [`curvature()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/curvature.md) :
  Get Expression Curvature
- [`expr_sign()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/expr_sign.md) :
  Get the DCP Sign of an Expression
- [`is_affine()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/is_affine.md) :
  Check if an Expression is Affine
- [`is_concave()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/is_concave.md)
  : Check if an Expression is Concave
- [`is_constant()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/is_constant.md)
  : Check if an Expression is Constant
- [`is_convex()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/is_convex.md) :
  Check if an Expression is Convex
- [`is_dcp()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/is_dcp.md) : Check
  if an Expression is DCP-Compliant
- [`is_dgp()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/is_dgp.md) : Check
  if a Constraint is DGP-Compliant
- [`is_dpp()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/is_dpp.md) : Check
  DPP Compliance
- [`is_dqcp()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/is_dqcp.md) :
  Check if Expression is DQCP-Compliant
- [`is_log_log_affine()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/is_log_log_affine.md)
  : Check if Expression is Log-Log Affine
- [`is_log_log_concave()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/is_log_log_concave.md)
  : Check if Expression is Log-Log Concave
- [`is_log_log_convex()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/is_log_log_convex.md)
  : Check if Expression is Log-Log Convex
- [`is_lp()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/is_lp.md) : Check if
  a Problem is a Linear Program
- [`is_matrix()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/is_matrix.md) :
  Is the Expression a Matrix?
- [`is_mixed_integer()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/is_mixed_integer.md)
  : Check if a Problem is Mixed-Integer
- [`is_nonneg()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/is_nonneg.md) :
  Check if Expression is Non-Negative
- [`is_nonpos()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/is_nonpos.md) :
  Check if Expression is Non-Positive
- [`is_nsd()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/is_nsd.md) : Check
  if Expression is Negative Semidefinite
- [`is_psd()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/is_psd.md) : Check
  if Expression is Positive Semidefinite
- [`is_pwl()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/is_pwl.md) : Check
  if Expression is Piecewise Linear
- [`is_qp()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/is_qp.md) : Check if
  a Problem is a Quadratic Program
- [`is_quadratic()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/is_quadratic.md)
  : Check if an Expression is Quadratic
- [`is_quasiconcave()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/is_quasiconcave.md)
  : Check if Expression is Quasiconcave
- [`is_quasiconvex()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/is_quasiconvex.md)
  : Check if Expression is Quasiconvex
- [`is_quasilinear()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/is_quasilinear.md)
  : Check if Expression is Quasilinear
- [`is_scalar()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/is_scalar.md) :
  Is the Expression a Scalar?
- [`is_symmetric()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/is_symmetric.md)
  : Check if Expression is Symmetric
- [`is_vector()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/is_vector.md) :
  Is the Expression a Vector?
- [`is_zero()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/is_zero.md) :
  Check if Expression is Zero
- [`length_expr()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/length_expr.md)
  : Length of a Vector (Last Nonzero Index)
- [`size()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/size.md) : Get
  Expression Size
- [`name()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/name.md) : Get
  Expression Name
- [`id()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/id.md) : Get Expression
  ID
- [`set_label()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/set_label.md) :
  Set a Label on a Constraint

## Problem properties

Extract components from a Problem object

- [`objective()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/objective.md) :
  Get Problem Objective (read-only)
- [`constraints()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/constraints.md)
  : Get Problem Constraints (read-only)
- [`variables()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/variables.md) :
  Get the Variables in an Expression
- [`parameters()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/parameters.md)
  : Get the Parameters in an Expression
- [`constants()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/constants.md) :
  Get the Constants in an Expression

## Utilities

Helpers and introspection

- [`as_cvxr_expr()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/as_cvxr_expr.md)
  : Convert a value to a CVXR Expression
- [`visualize()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/visualize.md) :
  Visualize the Canonicalization Pipeline of a CVXR Problem
- [`expr_H()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/expr_H.md) :
  Conjugate-Transpose of an Expression
- [`make_sparse_diagonal_matrix()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/make_sparse_diagonal_matrix.md)
  : Make a CSC sparse diagonal matrix
- [`rel_entr()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/rel_entr.md) :
  Relative Entropy: x\*log(x/y)

## Data

Example datasets

- [`cdiac`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/cdiac.md) : Global
  Monthly and Annual Temperature Anomalies (degrees C), 1850-2015
  (Relative to the 1961-1990 Mean) (May 2016)
- [`dspop`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/dspop.md) : Direct
  Standardization: Population
- [`dssamp`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/dssamp.md) : Direct
  Standardization: Sample

## Deprecated

Backward-compatible aliases (use the new names instead)

- [`get_problem_data()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/get_problem_data.md)
  **\[deprecated\]** : Get Problem Data for a Solver (deprecated)
- [`problem_status()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/problem_status.md)
  **\[deprecated\]** : Get the Solution Status of a Problem (deprecated)
- [`problem_solution()`](https://www.cvxgrp.org/CVXR/reference/problem_solution.md)
  **\[deprecated\]** : Get the Raw Solution Object (deprecated)
